task.title: Silo Feeding Screens
task.shortdesc: Click on the Silo Feeding tab at the top of the screen to display the

p.b: Main Screen and Popup Window for the Silo Loading Operation

step.cmd: Click on the Silo Feeding tab at the top of the screen to display the main Silo Feeding screen, shown below.

Click on the down arrow button to display the popup window to navigate to the other two operation screens—for the majors silos 1-8, and for the minors silos 12-18. These screens are shown on the following page.
